import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Visual pathway: 256x1024 -> 512
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 768),
            nn.LayerNorm(768),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Text pathway: 77x768 -> 512
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for multimodal fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        )
        self.ffn_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        )
        
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm_fusion = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        
        # Global pooling and classification
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512 * 2, 768),
            nn.LayerNorm(768),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        """
        Args:
            visual: [B, 256, 1024] - visual features from CLIP-ViT-L-14
            text: [B, 77, 768] - text features from CLIP-text-L
        Returns:
            [B, 13] - classification logits
        """
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=v_feat, key=t_feat, value=t_feat
        )
        v_out = self.norm1_v(v_feat + v_attended)
        v_ffn = self.ffn_visual(v_out)
        v_out = self.norm2_v(v_out + v_ffn)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=t_feat, key=v_feat, value=v_feat
        )
        t_out = self.norm1_t(t_feat + t_attended)
        t_ffn = self.ffn_text(t_out)
        t_out = self.norm2_t(t_out + t_ffn)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_global = v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_global = t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project inputs
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_proj, v_proj, v_proj)    # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)   # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)   # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate = self.gate_proj(concat_feat)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Apply gate to visual and text features separately then combine
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        gated_fusion = v_gated + t_gated  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Prepare for self-attention: stack features
        stacked = torch.stack([v_pooled, t_pooled, gated_fusion], dim=1)  # [B, 3, hidden]
        # Expand to match concatenated dimension
        stacked_expanded = torch.cat([
            stacked[:, 0:1].expand(-1, 2, -1).reshape(B, 2, self.hidden_dim),
            stacked[:, 1:2].expand(-1, 2, -1).reshape(B, 2, self.hidden_dim)
        ], dim=-1)  # Simplified: use direct concatenation instead
        
        # Alternative: use concatenated features with MLP fusion
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, t_pooled, 
            v_pooled * t_pooled,  # element-wise product
            torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled)  # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        self.text_to_visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.text_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            kdim=self.visual_dim,
            vdim=self.visual_dim,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Visual pooling and projection
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text pooling and projection  
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP with residual
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        attn_out, _ = self.text_to_visual_attn(
            query=text,      # [B, 77, 768]
            key=visual,      # [B, 256, 1024]
            value=visual     # [B, 256, 1024]
        )  # [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Pool visual features (mean pooling)
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_pool(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool attended text features (mean pooling)
        text_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text_feat = self.text_pool(text_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learned gate
        gate = self.gate(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate * visual_feat + (1 - gate) * text_feat  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual MLP
        fused = fused + self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        self.text_to_visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.text_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            kdim=self.visual_dim,
            vdim=self.visual_dim,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Visual pooling and projection
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text pooling and projection  
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output classifier with residual connections
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # text as query, visual as key/value
        attended_text, _ = self.text_to_visual_attn(
            query=text,      # [B, 77, 768]
            key=visual,      # [B, 256, 1024] 
            value=visual     # [B, 256, 1024]
        )  # -> [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Pool visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 1024]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Pool attended text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 768]
        text_pooled = self.text_pool(attended_text.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common space
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)        # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learnable gate
        gate_weight = self.gate(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate_weight * visual_feat + (1 - gate_weight) * text_feat  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual from concatenated features
        skip = self.skip_proj(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion with residual
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused + skip)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project visual features to sequence of tokens
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Project text features
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, 
            num_heads=8, 
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final projection layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head for 13 classes
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attended = self.norm1(v_feat + v_attended)
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attended = self.norm2(t_feat + t_attended)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.norm3(fused)
        
        # Add residual connection and process through MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Output prediction
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature-wise modulation
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 3, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_visual = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_text = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_proj = self.ln_visual(v_proj)
        t_proj = self.ln_text(t_proj)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_proj,
            key=v_proj,
            value=v_proj
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        t_refined, _ = self.self_attn(t_cross, t_cross, t_cross)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_refined = self.ln_fused(t_refined + t_cross)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        t_pooled = t_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        v_pooled = v_proj.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features for gating
        concat_for_gate = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Gating mechanisms
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(concat_for_gate)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate  # [B, 512]
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate  # [B, 512]
        
        # Element-wise interaction
        interaction = v_gated * t_gated  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion representation
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, interaction], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Output projection
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Pooling and fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)    # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(combined)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(combined)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates and fuse
        v_gated = gate_v * v_pooled
        t_gated = gate_t * t_pooled
        
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Project to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)    # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate based on visual features
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating to visual and combine
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate           # [B, 512]
        combined = torch.cat([v_gated, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        hidden = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classifier
        output = self.classifier(hidden)    # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project visual to sequence of tokens with reduced dim
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Project text to same hidden dim
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Feature-wise gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project modalities
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=v_proj, key=t_proj, value=t_proj
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attended = self.norm_v(v_proj + v_attended)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=t_proj, key=v_proj, value=v_proj
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attended = self.norm_t(t_proj + t_attended)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        g_v = self.gate_visual(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        g_t = self.gate_text(gate_input)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_pooled * g_v  # [B, 512]
        t_gated = t_pooled * g_t  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate gated features
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual feature processing: pool spatial dimensions first
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text feature processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention layers
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP with correct input dimension
        fusion_input_dim = self.hidden_dim * 4  # v_pooled + t_pooled + v_cross + t_cross
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_input_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Global pooling for compact representations
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=v_pooled,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=t_pooled,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all features for fusion
        # Squeeze sequence dim: [B, 1, 512] -> [B, 512]
        v_pooled_flat = v_pooled.squeeze(1)
        t_pooled_flat = t_pooled.squeeze(1)
        v_cross_flat = v_cross.squeeze(1)
        t_cross_flat = t_cross.squeeze(1)
        
        # Combine: [B, 512 * 4] = [B, 2048]
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled_flat, t_pooled_flat, v_cross_flat, t_cross_flat], dim=-1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project visual features to sequence of tokens
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Project text features
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        
        # Text attends to visual  
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Apply gating
        gate = self.gate(fused)
        gated = fused * gate
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(gated)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Gating
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)  # [B, 512]
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Re-fuse with gating
        fused_gated = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Add sequence dimension for self-attention
        fused_seq = fused_gated.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_out = fused_attn.squeeze(1) + fused_gated  # Residual connection
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        mlp_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_out)
        output = self.classifier(mlp_out)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool spatially then project
        # Use mean pooling across sequence first, then project
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        visual_feat = visual_feat.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.text_seq_len, -1)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> project
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual context
        # Create query from text, key/value from visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        attn_out = self.norm1(attn_out + text_feat)  # residual
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        attn_out = self.norm2(self_out + attn_out)
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        cross_feat = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get pooled visual and text separately
        visual_global = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_global = self.visual_proj(visual_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        text_global = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text_global = self.text_proj(text_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat_for_gate = torch.cat([visual_global, text_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        
        gated_visual = visual_global * gate_v
        gated_text = text_global * gate_t
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            gated_visual, 
            gated_text, 
            cross_feat
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_feat = self.ln_v(v_feat)
        t_feat = self.ln_t(t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        t_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)     # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        g_v = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        g_t = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * g_v
        t_gated = t_pooled * g_t
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.ln_fused(fused)
        
        # Residual connection from visual
        fused = fused + 0.3 * v_pooled
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_v1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_v2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_v3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        
        # Modality importance predictor
        self.modality_weight = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual -> text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_cross = self.ln_v1(v + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text -> visual  
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_cross = self.ln_t1(t + t_cross)
        
        # Self-attention
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_cross, v_cross, v_cross)
        v_self = self.ln_v2(v_cross + v_self)
        
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_cross, t_cross, t_cross)
        t_self = self.ln_t2(t_cross + t_self)
        
        # FFN
        v_ffn = self.ffn_visual(v_self)
        v_out = self.ln_v3(v_self + v_ffn)
        
        t_ffn = self.ffn_text(t_self)
        t_out = self.ln_t3(t_self + t_ffn)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Compute modality importance
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        mod_weights = self.modality_weight(concat_feat)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Weighted combination
        v_weighted = v_pooled * mod_weights[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * mod_weights[:, 1:2]
        
        # Gating
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_weighted, t_weighted], dim=-1)
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(gate_input)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(gate_input)
        
        v_gated = v_weighted * v_gate
        t_gated = t_weighted * t_gate
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature-wise modulation
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 4, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 4, self.common_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Pool visual to single representation using attention
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # Use pooled text as query, full visual as key/value
        t_query = t_pooled.expand(-1, self.text_seq_len, -1)  # [B, 77, 512]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(t_query, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        cross_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Gating: modulate features based on each other
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(cross_pooled.squeeze(1)).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(v_pooled.squeeze(1)).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        # [B, 1, 512] each -> concatenate -> [B, 1, 2048]
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, t_pooled,
            v_gated, t_gated,
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1, 2048]
        
        # Expand to sequence for self-attention with learnable queries
        queries = self.query_tokens.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 4, 512]
        
        # Combine with fused info
        fused_expanded = self.fusion_mlp(fused).expand(-1, 4, -1)  # [B, 4, 512]
        combined = queries + fused_expanded  # [B, 4, 512]
        
        # Final aggregation
        out = combined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        logits = self.classifier(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return logits

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        cross_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        self_pooled = self_out.mean(dim=1)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([cross_pooled, self_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate
        gate = self.gate_proj(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gate and fuse
        gated_cross = cross_pooled * gate
        gated_self = self_pooled * (1 - gate)
        fused = torch.cat([gated_cross, gated_self], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final processing
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        out = self.classifier(out)     # [B, 13]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feature fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_aggregated, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool text features
        t_pooled = t_aggregated.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool visual features with self-attention
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        v_pooled = v_self.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        g_v = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        g_t = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        # Apply gates and combine
        v_gated = v_pooled * g_v
        t_gated = t_pooled * g_t
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual connection from gated features
        residual = (v_gated + t_gated) / 2
        fused = fused + residual
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
