    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        fused_global = fused_seq.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also pool visual and text separately for gating
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_global * v_gate  # [B, 512]
        t_gated = t_global * t_gate  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all features
        combined = torch.cat([fused_global, v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final residual connection with gated features
        final_feat = fused + 0.5 * (v_gated + t_gated)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(final_feat)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool spatially first
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        visual_feat = visual_feat.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.text_seq_len, -1)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual context
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        attn_out = self.norm1(attn_out + text_feat)
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        attn_out = self.norm2(attn_out + self_out)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        attn_weights = torch.softmax(attn_out.mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        fused_global = (attn_out * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get max pooled features
        fused_max = attn_out.max(dim=1)[0]  # [B, 512]
        
        # Mean pooled features
        fused_mean = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate multiple views
        fused_cat = torch.cat([fused_global, fused_max, fused_mean], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Final fusion
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused_cat)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        logits = self.classifier(output)  # [B, 13]
        
        return logits

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature selection
        self.gate_fc = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_visual = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_text = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_feat = self.ln_visual(v_feat)
        t_feat = self.ln_text(t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on enhanced text
        t_refined, _ = self.self_attn(t_enhanced, t_enhanced, t_enhanced)
        t_refined = self.ln_fused(t_refined + t_enhanced)
        
        # Global average pooling
        t_pooled = t_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)     # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        gate_input = torch.cat([t_pooled, v_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_fc(gate_input)
        
        # Apply gate to text features, combine with visual
        t_gated = t_pooled * gate
        fused = torch.cat([t_gated, v_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final processing
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        out = self.classifier(out)    # [B, 13]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final MLP classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.num_queries = 4
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.common_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual (text as query, visual as key/value)
        # Output: [B, 77, 512]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )
        
        # Pool visual features using attention weights
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Combine: concatenate pooled visual with attended text
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_pooled.expand(-1, t_feat.size(1), -1),
            cross_out
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 77, 1024]
        
        # Gating
        gate = self.gate_proj(combined)  # [B, 77, 512]
        fused = gate * cross_out + (1 - gate) * v_pooled.expand(-1, t_feat.size(1), -1)
        
        # Expand queries and attend to fused features
        queries = self.query_tokens.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 4, 512]
        
        # Self-attention aggregation
        aggregated, _ = self.self_attn(
            query=queries,
            key=fused,
            value=fused
        )  # [B, 4, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling over queries
        out = aggregated.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        logits = self.classifier(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return logits

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + linear)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Global average pooling for initial representations
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: use text tokens to attend to visual features
        # Query from text, Key/Value from visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool enhanced text features
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        concat_global = torch.cat([v_global, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_global)  # [B, 1, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_global)    # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_global * gate_v  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gated = t_pooled * gate_t   # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Combine with original features using residual
        v_fused = v_global + v_gated
        t_fused = t_pooled + t_gated
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_fused.squeeze(1),      # [B, 512]
            t_fused.squeeze(1),      # [B, 512]
            (v_fused * t_fused).squeeze(1)  # [B, 512] - element-wise interaction
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate
        gate = self.gate_proj(concat_feat)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gated fusion
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention on sequence of pooled features (add batch dim for seq)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq, need_weights=False)
        fused_out = fused_attn.squeeze(1) + fused  # Residual connection
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        mlp_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_out)
        output = self.classifier(mlp_out)
        
        return output

    def forward(self, visual, text):

        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling for gating
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(gate_input)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_feat_gated = v_feat * v_gate.unsqueeze(1)
        t_feat_gated = t_feat * t_gate.unsqueeze(1)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_fused, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat_gated,
            key=v_feat_gated,
            value=v_feat_gated
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and pool
        combined = torch.cat([t_fused, t_feat_gated], dim=1)  # [B, 154, 512]
        
        # Self-attention
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(combined, combined, combined)
        
        # Multi-scale pooling
        pooled_mean = fused_attn.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        pooled_max = fused_attn.max(dim=1)[0]     # [B, 512]
        pooled_first = fused_attn[:, 0, :]        # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([pooled_mean, pooled_max, pooled_first], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Residual connection with gated global
        residual = v_gate * v_global + t_gate * t_global
        fused = fused + residual
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_feat = self.ln_v(v_feat)
        t_feat = self.ln_t(t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        
        # Pool both modalities
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)     # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.ln_fused(fused)
        
        # Residual connection with pooled features
        fused = fused + 0.5 * (v_pooled + t_pooled)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual projection with spatial pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection (CLS token weighted)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1))
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        visual_tokens = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, H]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        text_tokens = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, H]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Use mean-pooled text as query for all positions
        text_query = text_tokens.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, H]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_query.expand(-1, visual_tokens.size(1), -1),
            key=visual_tokens,
            value=visual_tokens
        )  # [B, 256, H]
        
        # Pool visual features
        visual_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, H]
        visual_max = cross_out.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, H]
        
        # Pool text features
        text_pooled = text_tokens.mean(dim=1)  # [B, H]
        text_max = text_tokens.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, H]
        
        # Learned gating
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(visual_pooled))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(text_pooled))
        
        # Gated fusion
        gated_visual = visual_pooled * gate_v
        gated_text = text_pooled * gate_t
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            gated_visual, 
            gated_text,
            visual_pooled * text_pooled,  # element-wise interaction
            torch.abs(visual_pooled - text_pooled)  # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, H*4]
        
        # Final processing
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, H]
        logits = self.classifier(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return logits

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool spatially first
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also keep full sequence for cross-attention
        visual_seq = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768]
        text_seq = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Use text as query, visual as key/value
        text_query = text_seq.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_query,
            key=visual_seq,
            value=visual_seq
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        cross_feat = cross_out.squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool text with self-attention
        text_pooled = text_seq.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learnable gates
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(combined)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(combined)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        visual_gated = visual_feat * gate_v   # [B, 512]
        text_gated = text_pooled * gate_t     # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion features
        fused = torch.cat([
            visual_gated + text_gated,  # additive fusion
            cross_feat,                  # cross-modal interaction
            visual_gated * text_gated   # multiplicative interaction
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Process through MLP
        hidden = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(hidden)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature-wise modulation
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 3, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on enhanced text
        t_refined, _ = self.self_attn(t_enhanced, t_enhanced, t_enhanced)
        
        # Global pooling
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_refined.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Modulate visual with gate from text interaction
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate + t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fusion_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_gated], dim=-1)
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fusion_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual connection and final prediction
        output = self.classifier(fused + v_gated)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 16)
        )
        
        # Text projection to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        self.layer_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.layer_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 16, hidden_dim]
        # First pool the spatial dimension
        visual_transposed = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual_transposed)  # [B, 1024, 16]
        visual_pooled = visual_pooled.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 16, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        attn_out = self.layer_norm1(attn_out + text_feat)
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        self_attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        text_fused = self.layer_norm2(self_attn_out + attn_out)
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        text_global = text_fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Also pool visual features
        visual_global = visual_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(visual_global)
        gate_t = self.gate_text(text_global)
        
        visual_gated = visual_global * gate_v
        text_gated = text_global * gate_t
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        combined = torch.cat([visual_gated, text_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Expand for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention with residual
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_seq = fused_seq + attn_out  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Squeeze and apply gating
        fused = fused_seq.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Split and apply gated fusion
        v_part, t_part = fused.chunk(2, dim=-1)  # each [B, 512]
        gated_fusion = gate * v_part + (1 - gate) * t_part  # [B, 512]
        
        # Combine with original concatenation
        fused_final = torch.cat([gated_fusion, v_part + t_part], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_final)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Output head
        out = self.output_head(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial reduction
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Learnable queries for cross-modal attention
        self.num_queries = 32
        self.query_embed = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.common_dim))
        
        # Cross-attention layers
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True
        )
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for modality importance
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * self.num_queries, 2048),
            nn.LayerNorm(2048),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(2048, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Expand queries: [B, num_queries, 512]
        queries = self.query_embed.expand(B, -1, -1)
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to visual
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            queries, v_feat, v_feat
        )
        v_attended = self.norm_v(v_attended)
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to text
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            queries, t_feat, t_feat
        )
        t_attended = self.norm_t(t_attended)
        
        # Compute gating weights based on both modalities
        gate_input = torch.cat([
            v_attended.mean(dim=1),  # [B, 512]
            t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        gate_weights = self.gate_net(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        gate_weights = gate_weights.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.num_queries, -1)  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate_weights * v_attended + (1 - gate_weights) * t_attended
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused)
        
        # Flatten and process
        fused_flat = fused.reshape(B, -1)  # [B, 32*512=16384]
        
        # Final MLP processing
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_flat)
        out = self.output_head(out)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual projection with spatial pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection (CLS token weighted)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1))
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.num_queries = 4
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.hidden_dim * 2))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # Use mean-pooled text as query
        text_query = text_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_query,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 1, hidden]
        cross_out = cross_out.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Global pooling
        visual_pooled = visual_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        text_pooled = text_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(visual_pooled))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(text_pooled))
        gate_weight = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_bias)
        
        gated_visual = gate_v * visual_pooled
        gated_text = gate_t * text_pooled
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        concat_feat = torch.cat([
            gated_visual,
            gated_text,
            cross_out,
            visual_pooled * text_pooled  # element-wise interaction
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*4]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(concat_feat)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Expand and attend with learnable queries
        expanded = torch.cat([fused, cross_out], dim=-1).unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.num_queries, -1)  # [B, num_queries, hidden*2]
        
        # Add query tokens
        queries = self.query_tokens.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, num_queries, hidden*2]
        combined = queries + expanded  # residual connection
        
        # Self-attention aggregation
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(combined, combined, combined)  # [B, num_queries, hidden*2]
        
        # Pool across queries
        final_feat = attn_out.mean(dim=1)[:, :self.hidden_dim]  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Residual connection with original fusion
        final_feat = final_feat + fused
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(final_feat)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial reduction
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Feature-wise gating for fusion control
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # t_feat as query, v_feat as key/value
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal output
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        t_pooled = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also pool visual features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        # Apply gates and combine
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate gated features
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common space
        self.vis_proj = nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.txt_proj = nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_vis = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_txt = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Pooling weights
        self.vis_pool_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        self.txt_pool_weight = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        vis_proj = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        txt_proj = self.txt_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        # txt_proj as query, vis_proj as key/value
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=txt_proj,
            key=vis_proj,
            value=vis_proj
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling with learned weights
        txt_pooled = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Visual pooling with attention weighting
        vis_pooled = vis_proj.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Compute gates
        combined = torch.cat([vis_pooled, txt_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate_v = self.gate_vis(combined)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_txt(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        vis_gated = vis_pooled * gate_v  # [B, 512]
        txt_gated = txt_pooled * gate_t  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([vis_gated, txt_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # FFNs
        self.ffn_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Global pooling and fusion
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 13)
        )
        
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_cross = self.norm1_v(v + self.dropout(v_cross))
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_cross = self.norm1_t(t + self.dropout(t_cross))
        
        # Gating: combine original and cross-attended features
        v_gate_input = torch.cat([v, v_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 256, 1024]
        t_gate_input = torch.cat([t, t_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 77, 1024]
        
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_gate_input.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_gate_input.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))   # [B, 1, 512]
        
        v_gated = v_gate * v_cross + (1 - v_gate) * v  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_gated = t_gate * t_cross + (1 - t_gate) * t  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on gated features
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_gated, v_gated, v_gated)
        v_self = self.norm2_v(v_gated + self.dropout(v_self))
        
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_gated, t_gated, t_gated)
        t_self = self.norm2_t(t_gated + self.dropout(t_self))
        
        # FFN
        v_out = v_self + self.ffn_v(v_self)
        t_out = t_self + self.ffn_t(t_self)
        
        # Global pooling strategies
        # Mean pooling
        v_mean = v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_mean = t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Max pooling
        v_max, _ = v_out.max(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_max, _ = t_out.max(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_mean, v_max, t_mean, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        )

        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features

        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for modality importance
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(

        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
