            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        # text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Expand queries
        queries = self.query_embed.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to visual
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            queries, v_feat, v_feat
        )  # [B, 32, 512]
        v_attended = self.norm1(v_attended + queries)
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to text
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            queries, t_feat, t_feat
        )  # [B, 32, 512]
        t_attended = self.norm2(t_attended + queries)
        
        # Compute gating weights based on pooled features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion of attended features
        fused = gate * v_attended + (1 - gate) * t_attended  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = self.norm3(fused + v_attended + t_attended)
        
        # Flatten and process
        fused_flat = fused.view(B, -1)  # [B, 32*512=16384]
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_flat)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused_out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project visual to sequence of tokens matching text length
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Project text to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Spatial pooling for visual (from 256 tokens)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 77),  # Reshape to match text length
            nn.LayerNorm(77),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, 
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual  
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8, 
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> project each token
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        # Pool visual from 256 to 77 tokens by transposing and linear transform
        v_pooled = v_proj.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden, 256]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_pooled)  # [B, hidden, 77]
        v_pooled = v_pooled.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        v_pooled = self.norm_v(v_pooled)
        
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        t_proj = self.norm_t(t_proj)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual features attend to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_pooled, key=t_proj, value=t_proj
        )  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text features attend to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_proj, key=v_pooled, value=v_pooled
        )  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        fused_seq = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, 77, hidden*2]
        fused_seq = self.norm_fused(fused_seq)
        
        # Self-attention on sequence
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        fused_global = fused_seq.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Split for gating
        v_part = fused_global[:, :self.hidden_dim]
        t_part = fused_global[:, self.hidden_dim:]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = self.gate_v(fused_global)
        gate_t = self.gate_t(fused_global)
        
        # Apply gates and combine
        gated = torch.cat([
            v_part * gate_v,
            t_part * gate_t
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(gated)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool spatially then project
        # Use mean pooling over sequence first, then project
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        visual_feat = visual_feat.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.text_seq_len, -1)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> project
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual context
        # Create query from text, key/value from visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        attn_out = self.norm1(attn_out + text_feat)  # residual
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        attn_out = self.norm2(self_out + attn_out)
        
        # Global pooling of attended features
        cross_feat = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get pooled visual and text features
        visual_global = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_global = self.visual_proj(visual_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        text_global = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text_global = self.text_proj(text_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat_for_gate = torch.cat([visual_global, text_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        
        gated_visual = visual_global * gate_v
        gated_text = text_global * gate_t
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            gated_visual,  # [B, 512]
            gated_text,    # [B, 512]
            cross_feat     # [B, 512]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.num_queries = 4
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.common_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Mean pool cross-attended features
        cross_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Mean pool original features
        visual_pooled = visual_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        text_pooled = text_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating between visual and text
        gate_input = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated combination
        gated_visual = visual_pooled * gate
        gated_text = text_pooled * (1 - gate)
        
        # Concatenate all features for fusion
        combined = torch.cat([
            gated_visual, 
            gated_text, 
            cross_pooled
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 512*3]
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # FFNs
        self.ffn_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Final fusion with gating
        self.fusion_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_cross = self.norm1_v(v + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_cross = self.norm1_t(t + t_cross)
        
        # Self-attention
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_cross, v_cross, v_cross)
        v_self = self.norm2_v(v_cross + v_self)
        
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_cross, t_cross, t_cross)
        t_self = self.norm2_t(t_cross + t_self)
        
        # FFN
        v_out = v_self + self.ffn_v(v_self)
        t_out = t_self + self.ffn_t(t_self)
        
        # Global pooling
        v_pooled = v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Feature-wise gating
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1))
        t_gate = self.gate_text(torch.cat([t_pooled, v_pooled], dim=-1))
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and output
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion gate for final weighting
        gate_weight = self.fusion_gate(fused)
        weighted = torch.cat([
            v_gated * gate_weight,
            t_gated * (1 - gate_weight)
        ], dim=-1)
        
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial reduction
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 16, self.common_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and pool
        combined = torch.cat([
            cross_out.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True),  # [B, 1, 512]
            visual_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)   # [B, 1, 512]
        ], dim=1)  # [B, 2, 512]
        
        # Expand learnable queries
        queries = self.query_tokens.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 16, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on concatenated features + queries
        attn_input = torch.cat([combined, queries], dim=1)  # [B, 18, 512]
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_input, attn_input, attn_input)
        
        # Extract processed queries
        processed_queries = attn_out[:, 2:, :]  # [B, 16, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling of queries
        pooled = processed_queries.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get cross-modal pooled features
        cross_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        gate_input = torch.cat([pooled, cross_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)
        
        # Apply gate
        gated = gate * pooled + (1 - gate) * cross_pooled
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([gated, pooled], dim=-1)
        
        # MLP processing
        mlp_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(mlp_out)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common dimension
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual -> text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        v_cross = self.norm1_v(v_feat + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text -> visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        t_cross = self.norm1_t(t_feat + t_cross)
        
        # Self-attention
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_cross, v_cross, v_cross)
        v_self = self.norm2_v(v_cross + v_self)
        
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_cross, t_cross, t_cross)
        t_self = self.norm2_t(t_cross + t_self)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_self.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_self.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        v_gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        t_gate_input = torch.cat([t_pooled, v_pooled], dim=-1)
        
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_gate_input)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_gate_input)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection with spatial reduction
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for modality importance
        self.gate_fc = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feature processing
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query from text, Key/Value from visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        # Compute attention scores for pooling
        attn_scores = torch.bmm(cross_out, v_feat.transpose(1, 2))  # [B, 77, 256]
        attn_weights = F.softmax(attn_scores, dim=-1)
        visual_pooled = torch.bmm(attn_weights, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Combine cross-attended text with attended visual
        combined = cross_out + visual_pooled  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention over combined sequence
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(combined, combined, combined)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        fused_pooled = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also pool original modalities for gating
        v_global = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_global = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Compute gate based on both modalities
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_fc(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        gated_fused = fused_pooled * gate + fused_pooled * (1 - gate) * 0.5
        
        # Final processing
        features = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(features)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        cross_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool visual features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([cross_pooled, v_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate
        gate = self.gate_proj(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gated fusion
        gated_v = gate * v_pooled
        gated_cross = (1 - gate) * cross_pooled
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([gated_v, gated_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Process through fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.vis_proj = nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.txt_proj = nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined features
        self.self_attn_vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_vis = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_txt = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_vis1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_vis2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_txt1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_txt2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        vis = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        txt = self.txt_proj(text)    # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual -> text
        vis_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_vis(vis, txt, txt)
        vis = self.ln_vis1(vis + vis_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text -> visual  
        txt_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_txt(txt, vis, vis)
        txt = self.ln_txt1(txt + txt_cross)
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        vis_self, _ = self.self_attn_vis(vis, vis, vis)
        vis = self.ln_vis2(vis + vis_self)
        
        txt_self, _ = self.self_attn_txt(txt, txt, txt)
        txt = self.ln_txt2(txt + txt_self)
        
        # Global average pooling
        vis_pooled = vis.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        txt_pooled = txt.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = self.gate_vis(torch.cat([vis_pooled, txt_pooled], dim=-1))
        gate_t = self.gate_txt(torch.cat([txt_pooled, vis_pooled], dim=-1))
        
        vis_gated = gate_v * vis_pooled
        txt_gated = gate_t * txt_pooled
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([vis_gated, txt_gated], dim=-1)
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection: reduce from 1024 to 512
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Text projection: reduce from 768 to 512
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual tokens: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        visual_tokens = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text tokens: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        text_tokens = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Mean pool visual to get global visual feature: [B, 512]
        visual_global = visual_tokens.mean(dim=1)
        
        # Use CLS-like approach: first token or mean pool for text query
        text_query = text_tokens.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual tokens
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_query,
            key=visual_tokens,
            value=visual_tokens
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        text_enhanced = attn_out.squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate visual and enhanced text features
        combined = torch.cat([visual_global, text_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fuse and classify
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing: reduce 256 spatial dims and project features
        self.visual_conv = nn.Conv1d(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim, kernel_size=1)
        self.visual_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Text processing: reduce 77 sequence length and project features
        self.text_conv = nn.Conv1d(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim, kernel_size=1)
        self.text_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.cross_attn_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 1024, 256] -> [B, hidden_dim, 256] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_conv(v)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_norm(v)
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 768, 77] -> [B, hidden_dim, 77] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_conv(t)  # [B, hidden_dim, 77]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_norm(t)
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 77]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal interaction
        v_attended = torch.sigmoid(self.cross_attn_v(t_pooled)) * v_pooled
        t_attended = torch.sigmoid(self.cross_attn_t(v_pooled)) * t_pooled
        
        # Combine
        combined = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion(combined)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Residual
        residual = v_pooled + t_pooled
        fused = fused + residual
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8

        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)

        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_v1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_v2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Global pooling projection
        self.pool_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Final classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        )
        
        # Direct residual path
        self.residual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual -> text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)
        v = self.ln_v1(v + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text -> visual  
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)
        t = self.ln_t1(t + t_cross)
        
        # Self-attention
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v, v, v)
        v = self.ln_v2(v + v_self)
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t, t, t)
        t = self.ln_t2(t + t_self)
        
        # FFN
        v = v + self.ffn_visual(v)
        t = t + self.ffn_text(t)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Gating on pooled features
        gate_input = fused
        g_v = self.gate_visual(gate_input)
        g_t = self.gate_text(gate_input)
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_pooled * g_v
        t_gated = t_pooled * g_t
        
        # Re-fuse with gates
        fused_gated = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        fused_proj = self.pool_proj(fused_gated)
        
        # Residual connection from raw fusion
        residual_out = self.residual_proj(fused)
        
        # Main prediction with residual
        main_out = self.classifier(fused_proj)
        
        # Combine both paths
        output = main_out + 0.3 * residual_out
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual pooling and projection
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text pooling and projection  
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for modality importance
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 13)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_proj = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_proj = self.text_pool(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Mean pool for initial representations
        visual_avg = visual_proj.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        text_avg = text_proj.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_proj,
            key=visual_proj,
            value=visual_proj
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(cross_out, cross_out, cross_out)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Global pooling of attended features
        attended_pooled = attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Compute gates based on both modalities
        combined_repr = torch.cat([visual_avg.squeeze(1), text_avg.squeeze(1)], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        gate_weights = self.gate(combined_repr)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Apply gating to attended features
        gated_features = attended_pooled * gate_weights  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate with visual summary for final fusion
        visual_summary = visual_proj.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        fused_input = torch.cat([gated_features, visual_summary], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Final processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused_input)  # [B, fused_dim//2]
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 128),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_visual = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_text = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v = self.ln_visual(v)
        t = self.ln_text(t)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t,
            key=v,
            value=v
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool visual and attended text
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)           # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_dim = 1024
        self.txt_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.vis_proj = nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        # Text projection to common space  
        self.txt_proj = nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_vis = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, batch_first=True)
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_txt = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_vis = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_txt = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head for 13 classes
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_vis = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_txt = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        vis_proj = self.vis_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        txt_proj = self.txt_proj(text)    # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        vis_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_vis(vis_proj, txt_proj, txt_proj)  # [B, 256, 512]
        txt_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_txt(txt_proj, vis_proj, vis_proj)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Gating
        vis_gate = self.gate_vis(vis_attended.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))  # [B, 1, 512]
        txt_gate = self.gate_txt(txt_attended.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        vis_gated = vis_attended * vis_gate
        txt_gated = txt_attended * txt_gate
        
        # Pool with attention weights
        vis_pooled = vis_gated.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        txt_pooled = txt_gated.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Max pooling for diversity
        vis_max = vis_gated.max(dim=1)[0]
        txt_max = txt_gated.max(dim=1)[0]
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        fused = torch.cat([vis_pooled, txt_pooled, vis_max, txt_max], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        fused = self.ln_fused(fused)
        
        # Self-attention refinement (treat as sequence of 1)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        refined = refined.squeeze(1) + fused  # Residual
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(refined)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        attn_out = self.norm1(attn_out + t_feat)
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        cross_fused = self.norm2(self_out + attn_out)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        cross_pooled = cross_fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also pool visual and text separately
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating between visual and text
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        gated_v = gate * v_pooled
        gated_t = (1 - gate) * t_pooled
        
        # Concatenate all features
        combined = torch.cat([cross_pooled, gated_v, gated_t], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention within each modality
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_self, t_self, t_self)  # visual attends to text
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_self, v_self, v_self)  # text attends to visual
        
        # Global pooling
        v_global = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_global = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        v_orig = v_feat.mean(dim=1)     # [B, 512]
        t_orig = t_feat.mean(dim=1)     # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        v_gate_input = torch.cat([v_global, v_orig], dim=-1)
        t_gate_input = torch.cat([t_global, t_orig], dim=-1)
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_gate_input)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_gate_input)
        
        v_fused = v_gate * v_global + (1 - v_gate) * v_orig
        t_fused = t_gate * t_global + (1 - t_gate) * t_orig
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_fused, t_fused, 
            v_fused * t_fused,  # element-wise interaction
            torch.abs(v_fused - t_fused)  # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768

        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8

        )

        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,

        )

        )
