            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # FFNs
        self.ffn_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Final fusion with global pooling and MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual -> text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_cross = self.norm1_v(v + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text -> visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_cross = self.norm1_t(t + t_cross)
        
        # Self-attention
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_cross, v_cross, v_cross)
        v_self = self.norm2_v(v_cross + v_self)
        
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_cross, t_cross, t_cross)
        t_self = self.norm2_t(t_cross + t_self)
        
        # FFN
        v_out = v_self + self.ffn_v(v_self)
        t_out = t_self + self.ffn_t(t_self)
        
        # Gating
        v_global = v_out.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True).expand(-1, v_out.size(1), -1)
        t_global = t_out.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True).expand(-1, t_out.size(1), -1)
        
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(torch.cat([v_out, v_global], dim=-1))
        t_gate = self.gate_text(torch.cat([t_out, t_global], dim=-1))
        
        v_fused = v_gate * v_out + (1 - v_gate) * v_global
        t_fused = t_gate * t_out + (1 - t_gate) * t_global
        
        # Global pooling strategies
        v_max, _ = v_fused.max(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        v_avg = v_fused.mean(dim=1)         # [B, 512]
        t_max, _ = t_fused.max(dim=1)       # [B, 512]
        t_avg = t_fused.mean(dim=1)         # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([v_max, v_avg, t_max, t_avg], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual pooling and projection
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text pooling and projection  
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 13)
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Pool visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_proj = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Pool text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_proj = self.text_pool(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Mean pool visual to create query
        visual_query = visual_proj.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual context attends to text tokens
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            visual_query, text_proj, text_proj
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        cross_out = self.norm1(cross_out + visual_query)
        
        # Expand for self-attention with visual features
        cross_expanded = cross_out.expand(-1, visual_proj.size(1), -1)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and self-attend
        combined = torch.cat([visual_proj, cross_expanded[:, :visual_proj.size(1)]], dim=1)
        # Actually let's do simpler: just use the cross output with pooled visual
        
        # Re-approach: pool both modalities
        visual_pooled = visual_proj.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        text_pooled = text_proj.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention on pooled features with sequence
        # Use text as query to attend to visual
        text_to_visual, _ = self.cross_attn(
            text_proj, visual_proj, visual_proj
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        text_enhanced = text_to_visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gate to visual, combine with text
        visual_gated = visual_pooled * gate  # [B, 512]
        fused = torch.cat([visual_gated, text_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final processing
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(features)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual projection to common space
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text projection to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Pool visual features (B, 256, 1024) -> (B, 1024) using attention pooling
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # (B, 1024)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # (B, 77, hidden_dim)
        
        # Expand visual for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_feat, t_feat)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        v_attended = v_attended.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        # Use mean pooled text as query
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_pooled, v_expanded, v_expanded)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim)
        t_attended = t_attended.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Self-attention on concatenated features (add sequence dimension)
        concat_seq = concat_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # (B, 1, hidden_dim*2)
        self_attended, _ = self.self_attn(concat_seq, concat_seq, concat_seq)
        self_attended = self_attended.squeeze(1)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Residual connection
        fused = concat_feat + self_attended  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_feat, t_feat.mean(dim=1), v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim*4)
        gate = self.gate(gate_input)  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Apply gate
        gated = fused * gate  # (B, hidden_dim*2)
        
        # Final fusion with skip connections
        combined = torch.cat([gated, concat_feat], dim=-1)  # (B, hidden_dim*4)
        output_feat = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # (B, hidden_dim)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(output_feat)  # (B, 13)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.vis_seq_len, self.vis_dim = 256, 1024
        self.txt_seq_len, self.txt_dim = 77, 768
        
        # Project both modalities to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.vis_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.vis_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.txt_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.txt_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim, 
            num_heads=8, 
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        vis_proj = self.vis_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        txt_proj = self.txt_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        vis_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=vis_proj,
            key=txt_proj,
            value=txt_proj
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        txt_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=txt_proj,
            key=vis_proj,
            value=vis_proj
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling
        vis_pooled = vis_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        txt_pooled = txt_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([vis_pooled, txt_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Expand for self-attention (treat as sequence of 1)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention with residual
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_seq = fused_seq + fused_attended  # [B, 1, 1024]
        
        # Squeeze and apply gating
        fused_out = fused_seq.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate_proj(fused_out)
        fused_gated = fused_out * gate  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Final residual connection and classification
        output = self.classifier(fused_gated + fused_out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention with temperature scaling
        temp = F.softplus(self.temperature) + 0.5
        
        # Visual attends to text
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat / temp,
            key=t_feat / temp,
            value=t_feat
        )
        
        # Text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat / temp,
            key=v_feat / temp,
            value=v_feat
        )
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate cross-modal features
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Expand for self-attention processing
        fused_expanded = fused.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, 4, -1)  # [B, 4, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused_expanded, fused_expanded, fused_expanded)
        fused_processed = fused_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Residual connection
        fused_final = fused_processed + fused
        
        # Gating
        gate = self.gate_net(fused_final)
        gated_fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled * gate[:, :self.common_dim],
            t_pooled * (1 - gate[:, :self.common_dim])
        ], dim=-1)
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        features = self.fusion_mlp(gated_fused)
        output = self.classifier(features)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(256, 1)  # Learnable pooling
        
        # Text processing: reduce sequence and project
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Linear(77, 1)  # Learnable pooling
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_combine = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, self.output_dim),
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.output_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v, t, t)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attended = self.fusion_norm1(v + v_attended)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attended = self.fusion_norm2(t + t_attended)
        
        # Pool both modalities
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_attended.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t_attended.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_pooled))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_pooled))
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate_v
        t_gated = t_pooled * gate_t
        
        # Combine with learned weights
        combined = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        fused = self.gate_combine(combined)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Deep fusion
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output with residual
        out = self.output_head(fused)
        skip = self.skip_proj(fused)
        
        return out + skip

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dimension then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text processing: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # [B, 768, 64]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
        )
        
        # Output heads with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13),
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 13)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 1024]
        v = self.visual_proj(v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 768, 77]
        t = self.text_pool(t)  # [B, 768, 64]
        t = t.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, 768]
        t = self.text_proj(t)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v, t, t)  # visual attends to text
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t, v, v)  # text attends to visual
        
        # Combine with residual
        v_fused = v + v_attended
        t_fused = t + t_attended
        
        # Concatenate and self-attention
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim*2]
        fused_attended, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = fused + fused_attended
        
        # Global average pooling
        fused = fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output with skip connection
        out = self.output_head(fused)
        skip = self.skip_proj(fused)
        
        return out + skip * 0.3

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(v_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = F.softmax(self.text_attn(t_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool cross-modal features
        v_cross_attn = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(v_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        v_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(v_cross_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        t_cross_attn = F.softmax(self.text_attn(t_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        t_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(t_cross_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, t_pooled, 
            v_cross_pooled, t_cross_pooled
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused)
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: spatial pooling with attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing: temporal pooling with attention
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connection
        self.output_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Skip connection adapter
        self.skip_adapter = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.output_dim)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024]
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = v_attn + v_proj  # residual
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_attn).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_global = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_attn).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = v_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = t_attn + t_proj  # residual
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_attn).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_global = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_attn).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v2t, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t2v, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        v_cross = v2t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_cross = t2v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_global, v_pooled, 
            t_global, t_pooled,
            v_cross, t_cross
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 6]
        
        # Reduce to expected fusion dimension
        fused = fused[:, :self.hidden_dim * 4]  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output with skip connection
        output = self.output_proj(fused_out) + self.skip_adapter(fused_out)
        
        return output  # [B, 13]

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial tokens and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)  # Pool 256 -> 1
        
        # Text processing: pool and project
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)  # Pool 77 -> 1
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final projection to output classes
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 13)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_seq = v_pooled.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_seq = t_pooled.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_seq, t_seq, t_seq)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_seq, v_seq, v_seq)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        v_attended = self.fusion_norm1(v_attended + v_seq).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_attended = self.fusion_norm2(t_attended + t_seq).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        gate = self.gate(concat)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Apply gate to both modalities and combine
        fused = gate * v_attended + (1 - gate) * t_attended  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Classifier
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: spatial pooling with attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Text processing: temporal pooling with attention
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        
        # Final fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # self-attention
        v_feat = v_feat + v_attn  # residual
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_pooled)
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # self-attention
        t_feat = t_feat + t_attn  # residual
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t_pooled)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # visual attends to text
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # text attends to visual
        
        # Pool cross-modal features
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Apply gating
        v_gated = self.gate_v(v_pooled) * v_cross_pooled
        t_gated = self.gate_t(t_pooled) * t_cross_pooled
        
        # Normalize and combine
        v_fused = self.fusion_norm1(v_pooled + v_gated)
        t_fused = self.fusion_norm2(t_pooled + t_gated)
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Generate output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output
