import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final projection to output classes
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Compute attention weights for pooling
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        
        # Weighted pooling
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_att_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_attended).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        t_att_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_attended).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        
        v_att_pooled = torch.bmm(v_att_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_attended).squeeze(1)
        t_att_pooled = torch.bmm(t_att_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_attended).squeeze(1)
        
        # Combine original and attended features
        v_combined = self.fusion_norm1(v_pooled + v_att_pooled)
        t_combined = self.fusion_norm2(t_pooled + t_att_pooled)
        
        # Gated fusion
        combined = torch.cat([v_combined, t_combined], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        gate = self.gate_proj(combined)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        fused = gate * v_combined + (1 - gate) * t_combined  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        # Adaptive pooling for visual features
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Text processing: project and pool
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        # Learnable query for text aggregation
        self.text_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=4, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual as query, text as key/value
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=self.num_heads, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
        
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_feat.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text self-attention aggregation
        t_query = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_aggregated, _ = self.text_attn(t_query, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_aggregated.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: enhance visual with text context
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            v_feat,  # [B, 256, hidden_dim] as query
            t_feat,  # [B, 77, hidden_dim] as key
            t_feat   # [B, 77, hidden_dim] as value
        )  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_cross = self.visual_pool(v_enhanced.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Combine features: global visual + text + cross-modal visual
        combined = torch.cat([v_cross, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Fuse
        fused = self.fusion(combined)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Add residual from pooled features
        residual = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        residual_proj = F.linear(residual, self.fusion[0].weight[:, :self.hidden_dim*2], self.fusion[0].bias)
        fused = fused + residual_proj
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Final projection
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head for 13 classes
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13),
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project and pool visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_global = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Project and pool text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_global = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v_attended_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_attended_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Normalize
        v_attended_pooled = self.fusion_norm1(v_attended_pooled)
        t_attended_pooled = self.fusion_norm2(t_attended_pooled)
        
        # Gated fusion
        v_gate_input = torch.cat([v_global, v_attended_pooled], dim=-1)
        t_gate_input = torch.cat([t_global, t_attended_pooled], dim=-1)
        
        v_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(v_gate_input))
        t_gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(t_gate_input))
        
        v_fused = v_gate * v_global + (1 - v_gate) * v_attended_pooled
        t_fused = t_gate * t_global + (1 - t_gate) * t_attended_pooled
        
        # Combine modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_fused, t_fused], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Final processing
        features = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim // 2]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(features)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: spatial pooling + projection
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing: temporal pooling + projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.fused_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 13)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Self-attention on expanded sequence (simulate with single token repeated)
        fused_seq = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, fused_dim]
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        fused_out = fused_attn.squeeze(1) + fused  # Residual
        
        # Classification with skip connection
        logits = self.classifier(fused_out)
        skip_logits = self.skip_proj(fused_out)
        
        return logits + 0.3 * skip_logits

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attn = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(v_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 256, 1]
        v_pooled = (v_feat * v_attn).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attn = F.softmax(self.text_attn(t_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        t_pooled = (t_feat * t_attn).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v_cross_attn = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(v_cross), dim=1)
        v_cross_pooled = (v_cross * v_cross_attn).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        t_cross_attn = F.softmax(self.text_attn(t_cross), dim=1)
        t_cross_pooled = (t_cross * t_cross_attn).sum(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, 
            t_pooled, 
            v_cross_pooled, 
            t_cross_pooled
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 768]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 256
        
        # Visual projection and pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(16)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256] -> [B, hidden_dim, 16]
        
        # Text projection and pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(16)  # [B, hidden_dim, 77] -> [B, hidden_dim, 16]
        
        # Cross-modal fusion with attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Feature fusion
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 32, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim] -> [B, hidden_dim, 256] -> [B, hidden_dim, 16]
        visual = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256]
        visual = self.visual_pool(visual)  # [B, hidden_dim, 16]
        visual = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim] -> [B, hidden_dim, 77] -> [B, hidden_dim, 16]
        text = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 77]
        text = self.text_pool(text)  # [B, hidden_dim, 16]
        text = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for cross-attention: [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        combined = torch.cat([visual, text], dim=1)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Self-attention for fusion
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(combined, combined, combined)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        # Flatten and fuse
        features = attn_out.reshape(B, -1)  # [B, 32 * hidden_dim]
        fused = self.fusion(features)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: spatial pooling with attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing: temporal pooling with attention
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim)
        self.gate_beta = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Multi-scale prediction heads
        self.head_shared = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        self.head_main = nn.Linear(512, self.output_dim)
        self.head_aux = nn.Linear(512, self.output_dim)
        
        # Initialize
        self._init_weights()
        
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v, v, v)  # self-attention
        v = v + v_attn  # residual
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t, t, t)  # self-attention
        t = t + t_attn  # residual
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention (bidirectional)
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_pooled.unsqueeze(1), t, t)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_pooled.unsqueeze(1), v, v)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        v_cross = v_cross.squeeze(1) + v_pooled
        t_cross = t_cross.squeeze(1) + t_pooled
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate_beta(torch.cat([v_cross, t_cross], dim=-1))  # [B, fused_dim]
        v_gate = self.gate_v(v_cross)
        t_gate = self.gate_t(t_cross)
        fused = gate * v_gate + (1 - gate) * t_gate  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Deep fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion(fused) + fused  # residual
        
        # Multi-head prediction with ensemble
        shared = self.head_shared(fused)
        out_main = self.head_main(shared)
        out_aux = self.head_aux(shared)
        
        # Ensemble with learned weighting
        output = 0.7 * out_main + 0.3 * out_aux  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual processing with spatial pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for multimodal fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.fusion_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.common_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
        )
        self.ffn_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
        )
        
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm_fusion = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 64),
            nn.LayerNorm(64),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(64, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v, t, t)
        v = self.norm1_v(v + v_cross)
        v_ffn = self.ffn_visual(v)
        v = self.norm2_v(v + v_ffn)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t, v, v)
        t = self.norm1_t(t + t_cross)
        t_ffn = self.ffn_text(t)
        t = self.norm2_t(t + t_ffn)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        g = self.gate(gate_input)
        fused = g * v_pooled + (1 - g) * t_pooled  # [B, 512]
        
        # Stack for self-attention: [B, 2, 512]
        stacked = torch.stack([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=1)
        attn_out, _ = self.fusion_attn(stacked, stacked, stacked)
        attn_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual connection
        final = self.norm_fusion(fused + attn_pooled)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(final)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final projection
        self.fusion_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.LayerNorm(128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_cross = self.fusion_norm1(v_feat + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_cross = self.fusion_norm2(t_feat + t_cross)
        
        # Pool visual features
        v_weights = self.visual_pool(v_cross).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 256]
        v_weights = F.softmax(v_weights, dim=-1)
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_cross).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool text features
        t_weights = self.text_pool(t_cross).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 77]
        t_weights = F.softmax(t_weights, dim=-1)
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_cross).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate(torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1))  # [B, hidden_dim]
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Final processing
        out = self.fusion_proj(fused)  # [B, 256]
        out = self.classifier(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dimension first
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_attn_pool = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_attn_pool = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13),
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for pooling
        self.visual_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        self.text_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)
        # Self-attention pooling with learnable query
        v_query = self.visual_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        v_pooled, _ = self.visual_attn_pool(v_query, v, v)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = v_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)
        # Self-attention pooling with learnable query
        t_query = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        t_pooled, _ = self.text_attn_pool(t_query, t, t)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention (bidirectional)
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_pooled.unsqueeze(1), t_pooled.unsqueeze(1), t_pooled.unsqueeze(1))
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_pooled.unsqueeze(1), v_pooled.unsqueeze(1), v_pooled.unsqueeze(1))
        
        v_enhanced = v_pooled + v_cross.squeeze(1) * 0.5
        t_enhanced = t_pooled + t_cross.squeeze(1) * 0.5
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Deep fusion network
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13),
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Project text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=visual_feat,
            key=text_feat,
            value=text_feat
        )
        visual_attended = self.fusion_norm1(visual_feat + visual_attended)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )
        text_attended = self.fusion_norm2(text_feat + text_attended)
        
        # Pool visual features with attention weights
        visual_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(visual_attended), dim=1)  # [B, 256, 1]
        visual_pooled = (visual_attended * visual_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool text features with attention weights
        text_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(text_attended), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        text_pooled = (text_attended * text_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat_feat = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        gate = self.gate(concat_feat)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        fused = gate * visual_pooled + (1 - gate) * text_pooled  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Deep fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output prediction
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        self.visual_dim = 1024

    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        # Pool visual with attention
        visual_query = self.visual_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        visual_pooled, _ = self.visual_attn_pool(visual_query, visual_feat, visual_feat)
        visual_pooled = visual_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        # Pool text with attention
        text_query = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)
        text_pooled, _ = self.text_attn_pool(text_query, text_feat, text_feat)
        text_pooled = text_pooled.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Visual attends to text
        v2t_out, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat)
        v2t_pooled = v2t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text attends to visual
        t2v_out, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat)
        t2v_pooled = t2v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            visual_pooled,      # [B, hidden_dim]
            text_pooled,        # [B, hidden_dim]
            v2t_pooled,         # [B, hidden_dim]
            t2v_pooled,         # [B, hidden_dim]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion_proj(fused)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with efficient pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention (visual as query, text as key/value)
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Classification head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable temperature for attention scaling
        self.temperature = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1) * 0.07)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn(
            v_feat, t_feat, t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )
        v_attended = F.dropout(v_attended, p=0.1, training=self.training)
        
        # Residual and self-attention on visual
        v_refined = v_attended + v_feat
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn(v_refined, v_refined, v_refined, need_weights=False)
        v_refined = v_refined + v_self
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        attn_weights = torch.softmax(
            v_refined.mean(dim=-1, keepdim=True) / self.temperature.abs(),
            dim=1
        )
        v_pooled = (v_refined * attn_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text global pooling (using [EOS] token approximation - last token)
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: spatial pooling with attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing: temporal pooling with attention
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_t = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1))
        
        # Fusion refinement
        self.fusion_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        self.fusion_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Deep classifier with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Skip connection for classifier
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.output_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024]
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = v_attn + v_proj  # residual
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_attn).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_global = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_attn).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = t_attn + t_proj  # residual
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_attn).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_global = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_attn).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v2t, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_global.unsqueeze(1), t_attn, t_attn)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t2v, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_global.unsqueeze(1), v_attn, v_attn)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        v_enhanced = v_global + v2t.squeeze(1) * 0.5
        t_enhanced = t_global + t2v.squeeze(1) * 0.5
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_v(v_enhanced))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_t(t_enhanced))
        gate = torch.sigmoid(gate_v + gate_t + self.gate_bias)
        
        fused = torch.cat([
            gate * v_enhanced + (1 - gate) * t_enhanced,
            gate * t_enhanced + (1 - gate) * v_enhanced
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Fusion refinement
        fused = self.fusion_norm(fused)
        fused = self.fusion_proj(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classification with skip
        out = self.classifier(fused) + self.skip_proj(fused) * 0.3
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13),
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project and pool visual features
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_proj).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Project and pool text features
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_proj).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool cross-modal features
        v_cross_attn = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        v_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(v_cross_attn.unsqueeze(1), v_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        t_cross_attn = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_cross).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        t_cross_pooled = torch.bmm(t_cross_attn.unsqueeze(1), t_cross).squeeze(1)
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, 
            t_pooled, 
            v_cross_pooled, 
            t_cross_pooled
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused)
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]

            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),

        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13),
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)

        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_proj).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]

        v2t_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t2v_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attended features
        v2t_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v2t_attn).squeeze(-1), dim=1)
        v2t_pooled = torch.bmm(v2t_weights.unsqueeze(1), v2t_attn).squeeze(1)

        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v2t_pooled, t2v_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused)
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
