        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim)
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Skip connection for output
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.output_dim)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # self-attention
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 256, 1]
        v_global = (v_feat * v_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # self-attention
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_feat), dim=1)  # [B, 77, 1]
        t_global = (t_feat * t_weights).sum(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_expanded = v_global.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_expanded = t_global.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_expanded, t_expanded, t_expanded)
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_expanded, v_expanded, v_expanded)
        
        v_enhanced = v_enhanced.squeeze(1) + v_global
        t_enhanced = t_enhanced.squeeze(1) + t_global
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_norm(fused)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output with skip connection
        fused_norm = self.output_norm(fused)
        out = self.output_head(fused_norm) + self.skip_proj(fused)
        
        return out  # [B, 13]

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing - spatial pooling with attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing - CLS-like aggregation
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 384),
            nn.LayerNorm(384),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(384, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Residual projection
        self.residual_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.output_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        v_attended, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)
        v_attended = v_attended + v_feat  # residual
        
        # Spatial attention pooling for visual
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_attended).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_global = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_attended).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        v_max = torch.max(v_attended, dim=1)[0]  # [B, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = v_global + v_max
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        t_attended, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)
        t_attended = t_attended + t_feat  # residual
        
        # Mean pooling for text (CLIP-style)
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_max = torch.max(t_attended, dim=1)[0]
        t_combined = t_pooled + t_max
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v2t, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_attended, t_attended, t_attended)
        t2v, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_attended, v_attended, v_attended)
        
        v_cross = v2t.mean(dim=1) + v2t.max(dim=1)[0]
        t_cross = t2v.mean(dim=1) + t2v.max(dim=1)[0]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled,      # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_combined,    # [B, hidden_dim]
            v_cross,       # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_cross        # [B, hidden_dim]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Deep fusion
        fused = self.fusion_proj(fused)
        
        # Output with residual
        out = self.classifier(fused)
        out = out + self.residual_proj(fused)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence length and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        # Adaptive pooling for visual features
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)  # [B, hidden_dim, 32]
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim * 2, self.num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output heads
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable modality fusion weights
        self.modality_gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, 512, 256] -> [B, 512, 32]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual_feat.transpose(1, 2)).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Visual attends to text
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            visual_pooled, text_feat, text_feat
        )  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Text attends to visual
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            text_feat, visual_pooled, visual_pooled
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool attended features
        visual_pooled_final = visual_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        text_pooled_final = text_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for fusion
        combined = torch.cat([visual_pooled_final, text_pooled_final], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Modality gating
        gate_weights = self.modality_gate(combined)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Apply gating
        visual_gated = visual_pooled_final * gate_weights[:, 0:1]
        text_gated = text_pooled_final * gate_weights[:, 1:2]
        gated_fusion = torch.cat([visual_gated, text_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Self-attention on sequence representation
        combined_seq = gated_fusion.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 1024]
        attended, _ = self.self_attn(combined_seq, combined_seq, combined_seq)
        attended = attended.squeeze(1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Residual connection and fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(attended + combined)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Global pooling and classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with attention pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing with attention pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual features
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_attn(v_proj).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features  
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn_weights = F.softmax(self.text_attn(t_proj).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool cross-modal features
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, 
            t_pooled, 
            v_cross_pooled, 
            t_cross_pooled
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dimension then project
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)  # [B, 1024, 1]
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text processing: pool and project
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)  # [B, 768, 1]
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            dropout=0.1,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Modality type embeddings for cross-attention
        self.modality_embed = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(2, 1, self.hidden_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, 1024, 256] -> [B, 1024, 1] -> [B, 1024]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, 768, 77] -> [B, 768, 1] -> [B, 768]
        text_pooled = self.text_pool(text.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 768]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Stack for cross-attention: [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        stacked = torch.stack([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=1)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        
        # Add modality embeddings
        stacked = stacked + self.modality_embed.unsqueeze(0).expand(B, -1, -1, -1).squeeze(2)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(stacked, stacked, stacked)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        fused = torch.cat([attn_out[:, 0], attn_out[:, 1]], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention refinement
        refined, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        refined = refined.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused_feat = self.fusion_mlp(refined)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused_feat)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing with pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Text processing with pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1),
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Final projection to output
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13),
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual features
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_proj).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_pooled = torch.bmm(v_attn_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_proj).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_pooled = torch.bmm(t_attn_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_proj).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Expand for cross-attention
        v_seq = v_proj  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_seq = t_proj  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual attends to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_seq, t_seq, t_seq)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_cross = self.fusion_norm1(v_cross + v_seq)
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_seq, v_seq, v_seq)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_cross = self.fusion_norm2(t_cross + t_seq)
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Combine pooled representations
        fused = torch.cat([v_cross_pooled, t_cross_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Add residual from direct pooled features
        direct_fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        direct_fused = F.linear(direct_fused, 
                               torch.cat([self.fusion_mlp[0].weight[:, :self.hidden_dim],
                                         self.fusion_mlp[0].weight[:, self.hidden_dim:]], dim=1),
                               self.fusion_mlp[0].bias)
        fused = fused + 0.1 * torch.tanh(direct_fused)
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing - spatial pooling with attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Text processing - temporal attention
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Residual connection
        self.residual_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.output_dim)
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn = v_attn + v_proj  # residual
        v_pooled = v_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        v_weighted = torch.sigmoid(self.visual_pool(v_pooled)) * v_pooled  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn = t_attn + t_proj  # residual
        t_pooled = t_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_seq = v_attn  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_seq = t_attn  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_seq, t_seq, t_seq)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_seq, v_seq, v_seq)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        v_cross_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_cross_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate all features
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_weighted,           # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_pooled,             # [B, hidden_dim]
            v_cross_pooled,       # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_cross_pooled        # [B, hidden_dim]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = self.fusion_proj(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output with residual
        out = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, output_dim]
        out = out + self.residual_proj(fused)  # residual
        
        return out  # [B, 13]

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Text processing: CLS-like aggregation
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Visual attends to text
        v_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        # Text attends to visual
        t_attn, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Global pooling
        v_global = v_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_global = t_attn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Also use original pooled features for residual
        v_orig = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_orig = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([v_global, t_global, v_orig, t_orig], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classifier
        out = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(256, 1)  # Learnable pooling
        
        # Text processing: reduce sequence and project
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Linear(77, 1)  # Learnable pooling
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Visual attends to text
        visual_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat
        )  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_attended = self.fusion_norm1(visual_feat + visual_attended)
        
        # Text attends to visual
        text_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_attended = self.fusion_norm2(text_feat + text_attended)
        
        # Learnable pooling to get global features
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(
            visual_attended.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256]
        ).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        text_pooled = self.text_pool(
            text_attended.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 77]
        ).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Visual processing - reduce sequence length and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)  # Reduce 256 -> 64
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention layers
        self.visual_to_text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        self.text_to_visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim, self.num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fusion
        self.fusion_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            self.hidden_dim * 2, self.num_heads, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Projection to fused representation
        self.fusion_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Deep classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fusion = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden_dim, 256]
        v = self.visual_pool(v)  # [B, hidden_dim, 64]
        v = v.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v = self.norm_v(v)
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t = self.norm_t(t)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_enhanced, _ = self.visual_to_text_attn(v, t, t)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        t_enhanced, _ = self.text_to_visual_attn(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool enhanced features
        v_pooled = v_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = t_enhanced.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate
        fused = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate = self.gate(fused)
        fused = fused * gate
        
        # Project and classify
        fused = self.fusion_proj(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: use adaptive pooling to avoid dimension issues
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Adaptive pooling for visual features
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)
        
        # Adaptive pooling for text features  
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, 8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion network
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Linear(256, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> project first -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        # Pool over spatial dimension: [B, 256, hidden_dim] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_proj.transpose(1, 2)).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = v_pooled.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> project first -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        # Pool over temporal dimension: [B, 77, hidden_dim] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t_proj.transpose(1, 2)).transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = t_pooled.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: use as query/key/value
        v_seq = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_seq = t_feat.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate for attention
        combined = torch.cat([v_seq, t_seq], dim=1)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        attended, _ = self.cross_attn(combined, combined, combined)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        
        # Split and fuse
        v_out = attended[:, 0, :]  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_out = attended[:, 1, :]  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_out, t_out], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        out = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: spatial pooling + projection
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text processing: temporal pooling + projection
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Feed-forward after attention
        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim), nn.Sigmoid())
        
        # Final classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim),
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 1024] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 1024]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(v_pooled)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 768] -> [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(text.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 768]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(t_pooled)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Prepare for cross-attention: [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        v_seq = v_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        t_seq = t_feat.unsqueeze(1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_seq, t_seq, t_seq)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_seq, v_seq, v_seq)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim]
        
        v_cross = self.norm_v(v_cross.squeeze(1) + v_feat)
        t_cross = self.norm_t(t_cross.squeeze(1) + t_feat)
        
        # Concatenate for self-attention
        fused_seq = torch.stack([v_cross, t_cross], dim=1)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        
        # Self-attention
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        fused_attn = self.norm_fused(fused_attn + fused_seq)
        
        # Apply FFN
        fused_ffn = self.ffn(fused_attn) + fused_attn
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        fused_pooled = fused_ffn.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Also extract individual modalities with gating
        v_gated = self.gate_visual(v_cross) * v_cross
        t_gated = self.gate_text(t_cross) * t_cross
        
        # Combine features
        combined = torch.cat([fused_pooled, v_gated + t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(combined)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: spatial pooling with attention
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Text processing: CLS-like aggregation
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.text_pool = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 1)
        
        # Cross-modal fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.fusion_norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head with residual connections
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.output_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features [B, 256, 1024]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_attn, _ = self.visual_attn(v_feat, v_feat, v_feat)  # Self-attention
        v_feat = v_feat + v_attn  # Residual
        v_weights = F.softmax(self.visual_pool(v_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 256]
        v_global = torch.bmm(v_weights.unsqueeze(1), v_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text features [B, 77, 768]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_attn, _ = self.text_attn(t_feat, t_feat, t_feat)  # Self-attention
        t_feat = t_feat + t_attn  # Residual
        t_weights = F.softmax(self.text_pool(t_feat).squeeze(-1), dim=1)  # [B, 77]
        t_global = torch.bmm(t_weights.unsqueeze(1), t_feat).squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v2t, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v_global.unsqueeze(1), t_feat, t_feat)
        t2v, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t_global.unsqueeze(1), v_feat, v_feat)
        
        v_enhanced = self.fusion_norm_v(v_global + v2t.squeeze(1))
        t_enhanced = self.fusion_norm_t(t_global + t2v.squeeze(1))
        
        # Fuse modalities
        fused = torch.cat([v_enhanced, t_enhanced], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output with skip connection
        out = self.output_head(fused) + self.skip_proj(fused)
        
        return out

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: use adaptive pooling to avoid dimension issues
        self.visual_adaptive_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(64)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Text processing
        self.text_adaptive_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(32)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention with proper dimensions
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion network
        self.fusion_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2 + 64 + 32, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> treat 256 as sequence, 1024 as features
        # Pool along sequence dimension: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, 1024] -> [B, 64 * 1024] no, need different approach
        # Actually: we want to pool the 256 tokens to get fixed size
        visual_transposed = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_adaptive_pool(visual_transposed)  # [B, 1024, 64]
        visual_pooled = visual_pooled.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 64]
        
        # Global visual feature
        visual_global = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_global)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768]
        text_transposed = text.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 768, 77]
        text_pooled = self.text_adaptive_pool(text_transposed)  # [B, 768, 32]
        text_pooled = text_pooled.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 32]
        
        # Global text feature
        text_global = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_global)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-attention: create query/key/value from features
        # Stack as sequences for attention
        combined_seq = torch.stack([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=1)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        
        # Self-attention on the two modalities
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(combined_seq, combined_seq, combined_seq)  # [B, 2, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool attention output
        attn_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Also use individual attended features
        visual_attended = attn_out[:, 0, :]  # [B, hidden_dim]
        text_attended = attn_out[:, 1, :]  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate all features
        combined = torch.cat([visual_attended, text_attended, visual_pooled, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2 + 64 + 32]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = self.fusion_net(combined)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_attn_pool = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Text processing: project and pool
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_attn_pool = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion layers
        self.fusion = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual features
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_pooled, _ = self.visual_attn_pool(v_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_global = v_pooled.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Process text features  
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_pooled, _ = self.text_attn_pool(t_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_global = t_pooled.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_proj, v_proj, v_proj)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_cross_global = v_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_cross_global = t_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_global,           # [B, 512]
            t_global,           # [B, 512]
            v_cross_global,     # [B, 512]
            t_cross_global      # [B, 512]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Fusion and classification
        fused = self.fusion(fused)  # [B, 768]
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual processing: reduce sequence and project
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.Linear(256, 1)  # Learnable pooling
        
        # Text processing: reduce sequence and project
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.Linear(77, 1)  # Learnable pooling
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Initialize weights
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        # Visual attends to text
        v2t_out, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        # Text attends to visual
        t2v_out, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        
        # Pool both modalities
        # Transpose for pooling: [B, hidden_dim, seq_len] -> pool -> [B, hidden_dim, 1]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v2t_out.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t2v_out.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        pooled_cat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Expand for self-attention
        pooled_expanded = pooled_cat.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Self-attention
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(pooled_expanded, pooled_expanded, pooled_expanded)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim * 2]
        self_out = self_out.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 2]
        
        # Combine with pooled features (residual)
        combined = torch.cat([self_out, pooled_cat], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim * 4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial tokens with attention pooling
        self.visual_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 64, self.hidden_dim))
        self.visual_key_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_value_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.visual_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Text processing: preserve sequence with lightweight attention
        self.text_query = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 32, self.hidden_dim))
        self.text_key_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_value_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_norm = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Fusion MLP with residual connections
        self.fusion_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Deep classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.15),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Visual attention pooling: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        visual_k = self.visual_key_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_v = self.visual_value_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        visual_q = self.visual_query.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        
        # Scaled dot-product attention for visual
        visual_scores = torch.bmm(visual_q, visual_k.transpose(1, 2)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        visual_attn = F.softmax(visual_scores, dim=-1)
        visual_feat = torch.bmm(visual_attn, visual_v)  # [B, 64, hidden_dim]
        visual_feat = self.visual_norm(visual_feat)
        
        # Text attention pooling: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        text_k = self.text_key_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_v = self.text_value_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        text_q = self.text_query.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        
        text_scores = torch.bmm(text_q, text_k.transpose(1, 2)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)
        text_attn = F.softmax(text_scores, dim=-1)
        text_feat = torch.bmm(text_attn, text_v)  # [B, 32, hidden_dim]
        text_feat = self.text_norm(text_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        visual_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            visual_feat, text_feat, text_feat
        )
        visual_cross = visual_cross + visual_feat  # residual
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        text_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            text_feat, visual_feat, visual_feat
        )
        text_cross = text_cross + text_feat  # residual
        
        # Global pooling
        visual_global = visual_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        text_global = text_cross.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([visual_global, text_global], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_proj(fused)
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Visual processing: reduce spatial dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Text processing: use CLS-like pooling
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        
        # Cross-modal attention for fusion
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Self-attention on fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(self.hidden_dim * 2, num_heads=8, batch_first=True, dropout=0.1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 384),
            nn.LayerNorm(384),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(384, 13),
        )
        
        # Layer norms for attention
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024]
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project and pool visual features
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_feat.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Project and pool text features  
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_pooled = self.text_pool(t_feat.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=self.ln_v(v_feat),
            key=self.ln_t(t_feat),
            value=t_feat
        )
        v_attended = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=self.ln_t(t_feat),
            key=self.ln_v(v_feat),
            value=v_feat
        )
        t_attended = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        cross_fused = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Self-attention on sequence of pooled features
        fused_seq = torch.stack([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_attended, t_attended], dim=1)  # [B, 4, hidden_dim]
        # Pad to make compatible with self attention on cross_fused
        fused_expanded = cross_fused.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, hidden_dim*2]
        
        # Combine all representations
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_pooled,           # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_pooled,           # [B, hidden_dim]
            v_attended,         # [B, hidden_dim]
            t_attended,         # [B, hidden_dim]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classifier
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_seq_len = 256
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Query: text, Key/Value: visual
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        cross_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool visual features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([cross_pooled, v_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Compute gate
        gate = self.gate_proj(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gated fusion
        gated_v = gate * v_pooled
        gated_cross = (1 - gate) * cross_pooled
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([gated_v, gated_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Process through fusion MLP
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused_out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output
